name: cashsnap_webgl_background_banks_v1
description: Review registry for WebGL table/background texture banks. Trainable-candidate renders may only use accepted banks; proof-only banks are smoke/diagnostic evidence, not production training data.

banks.blocker: too small and low-variety for trainable background claims
